name: Meilisearch Search Engine
description: An ultra-lightweight, blazing-fast, Rust-based search engine with a clean web dashboard.

aws.service: Amazon OpenSearch Service (or self-host on ECS)
aws.parity: Index and full-text search locally with the same documents and ranking you will run in production.
aws.deploy: Either self-host Meilisearch on ECS behind an ALB, or migrate the index to an Amazon OpenSearch domain.

variables.label: Binding Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access Meilisearch and its dashboard.

variables.label: Master Security Key
variables.description: The administrative password required to read/write search indexes.
